summary: Completed frontend testing of SLA indicators in Evolution PRO Done-for-You system. All 10 SLA features verified successfully via Playwright UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: stepConfig.js correctly exports STEP_SLA with sla and slaLabel fields for all 6 main steps
STEP_SLA includes extra entries for webinar (48h) and email (24h) as required
PartnerDashboardSimplified.jsx shows '21 giorni' SLA block with 3 cards (Setup 24h, Contenuti 48h, Lancio 24h)
CTA block shows 'Tempo stimato: Xh' for current step using STEP_SLA lookup
Progress list shows SLA badge (e.g., '24h') next to current step with Clock icon
DoneForYouWrapper.jsx shows StatusBadge + SlaBadge in Admin view
SlaBadge component displays 'Entro Xh' with Timer icon
PreparazioneView shows SLA detail row in dark block ('Tempo stimato: 48h • In revisione')
Authoritative copy 'Il team sta lavorando su questo step. Sara pronto entro X ore.' implemented in PreparazioneView
'Processo garantito' block with Shield icon implemented in PreparazioneView
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA indicators fully implemented and tested. Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has: posizionamento=completato, funnel-light=pronto, masterclass=in_revisione, videocorso=in_lavorazione. The SLA values are: posizionamento=24h, funnel-light=24h, masterclass=48h, videocorso=48h, funnel=48h, lancio=24h, webinar=48h, email=24h. Admin view shows both StatusBadge and SlaBadge. Partner view shows PreparazioneView for in_lavorazione/in_revisione states with authoritative copy and 'Processo garantito' block.
